message:
Merge PR #2494: fix: prevent TOML env from overwriting AgentEnv identity vars

Skip TOML [env] keys already set by AgentEnv to prevent unqualified
values from overwriting fully-qualified identity vars (GT_ROLE, BD_ACTOR).

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2494
Author: popandpeek (Ben Pittman)

Co-authored-by: Ben Pittman <popandpeek@users.noreply.github.com>
